description.en: Create a new DNS record in a Cloudflare zone.
description.de: Einen neuen DNS-Eintrag in einer Cloudflare-Zone erstellen.
description.es: Create a new DNS record in a Cloudflare zone.
description.fr: Create a new DNS record in a Cloudflare zone.
description.ro: Create a new DNS record in a Cloudflare zone.
description.it: Create a new DNS record in a Cloudflare zone.

vars.API_TOKEN: env:CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN|Get your API token from Cloudflare Dashboard > My Profile > API Tokens.

description.en: Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.
description.es: Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.
description.fr: Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.
description.ro: Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.
description.it: Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.

inputs.name: Name
inputs.bot: The DNS record name. Use '@' for the root domain.

inputs.name: Content

description.en: Record content (e.g., IP address for A record, domain for CNAME).
description.es: Record content (e.g., IP address for A record, domain for CNAME).
description.fr: Record content (e.g., IP address for A record, domain for CNAME).
description.ro: Record content (e.g., IP address for A record, domain for CNAME).
description.it: Record content (e.g., IP address for A record, domain for CNAME).

inputs.bot: The record value. For A records: an IP address. For CNAME: a domain. For TXT: the text value.

inputs.name: Proxied

description.en: Whether the record is proxied through Cloudflare (true/false).
description.es: Whether the record is proxied through Cloudflare (true/false).
description.fr: Whether the record is proxied through Cloudflare (true/false).
description.ro: Whether the record is proxied through Cloudflare (true/false).
description.it: Whether the record is proxied through Cloudflare (true/false).

inputs.bot: Set to true to proxy traffic through Cloudflare (orange cloud). false for DNS-only (grey cloud).
